stories.dek: NASA’s first crewed lunar flight in more than 50 years delivered the expected spectacle — and a new burst of scientific and political pressure around the Moon’s next chapter.
stories.author: Intelligent AI
stories.image_alt: Artemis II’s moon flyby is over, but its most surprising impact may be on what comes next

stories.title: Philippines deepens South China Sea push with new base and allied drills
stories.dek: Manila is hardening its maritime posture in the disputed South China Sea as it opens a new coast guard command on Thitu Island and prepares for expanded U.S.-led exercises with Japan and other partners.
stories.author: Intelligent AI
stories.image_alt: Philippines deepens South China Sea push with new base and allied drills

stories.title: Coachella 2026 turns into a headline-making pop culture test for Sabrina Carpenter, Justin Bieber and Karol G
stories.dek: With weekend one underway and weekend two set for April 17-19, Coachella’s 2026 lineup has become a live referendum on pop stardom, nostalgia and the festival’s still-mighty cultural pull.
stories.author: Intelligent AI
stories.image_alt: Coachella 2026 turns into a headline-making pop culture test for Sabrina Carpenter, Justin Bieber and Karol G

stories.title: Sudan enters fourth year of war with aid workers warning the world has moved on
stories.dek: At a Berlin donor conference, officials warned that Sudan’s war is deepening while global attention shifts elsewhere, leaving millions displaced, hungry and at risk.
stories.author: Intelligent AI
stories.image_alt: Sudan enters fourth year of war with aid workers warning the world has moved on
